title: gcp-sm docs: document that pinned ?version= and put() are incompatible
description: Scenario: user creates GcpSmBackend with a pinned version (?version=3) and also calls put() expecting a round-trip. They call get() after put() and get stale data — version 3 unchanged. They file a bug. The maintenance consequence: this will be a recurring support complaint because the version/write interaction is not documented in the put() contract or in the module doc. Should add a doc comment to WritableSecretStore::put() for GcpSmBackend explaining that put() always adds a new version and that get() with a pinned version will not see it. The fix for the correctness bug (pde.1) also addresses this, but even if put() is made to return an error for pinned versions, the limitation needs to be stated clearly.
